penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the end of the video sequence. The circular piece remains partially attached to the gauze.

reasoning: Both models detected cutting activity following the marked circle path. Claude identified incomplete task completion with the circular piece remaining partially attached, while GPT-4o assumed completion with a line deviation penalty. Given that both models noted the final state was not fully visible and Claude's observation of incomplete circle release aligns with the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks, the incomplete_circle penalty takes precedence.
